flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Hawaii Maui College fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (11.1% → 7.7%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Hawaii Maui College fell 25% between 2020 and 2023 (66.7% → 50.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at University of Hawaii Maui College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.6k vs 2.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Hawaii Maui College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9k → 1.7k).
